allow: Bash(cd /c/projects/planista3/backend && npx prisma migrate dev --name init 2>&1)
Bash(cd /c/projects/planista3/backend && npx prisma migrate dev --name add_schedule_entry 2>&1)
Bash(taskkill //PID 22764 //F && sleep 2 && cd /c/projects/planista3/backend && npx prisma generate 2>&1)
Bash(cd /c/projects/planista3/frontend && npx shadcn@latest add button input label card table badge tabs dialog select sonner --overwrite --yes 2>&1)
Bash(cd /c/projects/planista3/backend && npx prisma migrate dev --name add_schedule_templates 2>&1)
Bash(cd /c/projects/planista3/backend && npx prisma migrate dev --create-only --name add_schedule_templates 2>&1)
Bash(cd /c/projects/planista3/backend && echo "y" | npx prisma migrate dev --name add_schedule_templates 2>&1)
